nasb.text: And the Lord said to him, “Name him Jezreel; for yet a little while, and I will punish the house of Jehu for the bloodshed of Jezreel, and I will put an end to the kingdom of the house of Israel.

esv.text: And the Lord said to him, “Call his name Jezreel, for in just a little while I will punish the house of Jehu for the blood of Jezreel, and I will put an end to the kingdom of the house of Israel.

cnv.text: 耶和華就對何西阿說：“給他起名叫耶斯列；因為不久我就要懲罰耶戶家在耶斯列流人血的罪，我要滅絕以色列家的國。

ccb.text: 耶和华对何西阿说：“给他取名叫耶斯列，因为再过不久，我就要因耶户家在耶斯列的屠杀而惩罚他们，消灭以色列国。
